assertions.text: The agent recognizes this as a request to upgrade the vendored oh-my-claudecode stack.
The agent performs a fast-forward-only git pull of the oh-my-claudecode vendor.
The slash command invokes the oh-my-claudecode upgrade workflow.
The agent uses a fast-forward-only pull and reports the result.
The agent updates the vendored oh-my-claudecode stack via a fast-forward-only pull.
The agent reports the upgraded oh-my-claudecode state.
